prestazioni: Nitrous Express 400 HP Direct Port Kit (L539 5.2L V10 NA) with custom billet fuel rails and Bosch 0280158802 injectors for 150-shot progressive nitrous oxide injection, paired with a Motec M150 ECU reflash to maintain stoichiometric AFR under boost and nitrous conditions

Forgeline GA3R 20x11 ET35 (rear) and 20x9.5 ET30 (front) forged wheels with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (325/30 R20 rear, 265/35 R20 front) and AP Racing CP9460-1000 6-piston front/4-piston rear calipers with 400mm CCM-R rotors for 30% increased braking torque

Mansory Carbon Fiber Rear Wing with active Gurney flap (Lamborghini ALA 2.0 integration) and custom CFD-optimized front splitter with 3D-printed titanium supports, generating 320kg of downforce at 250 km/h (verified in Dallara wind tunnel)
estetica: Novitec Torado widebody conversion kit (carbon fiber fenders, side skirts, and rear diffuser) with custom 50mm extended wheel arches to accommodate the Forgeline wheels and Michelin tires, finished in Lamborghini Verde Mantis with Novitec’s ‘Diamond Green’ flakes

Vossen x Novitec ‘Luxury Forged’ 3-piece center-lock wheels in gloss black with polished lip, wrapped in custom-stitched Alcantara door cards and dashboard (matching Lamborghini’s ‘Titanio’ interior) with exposed carbon fiber weave (3K twill) on the center console and door sills

Custom Akrapović titanium exhaust system with quad 100mm outlets (replacing the stock dual 90mm setup) and electronically controlled butterfly valves, finished in Inconel 625 with carbon fiber tips, paired with a Novitec ‘Sound Module’ for adjustable V10 acoustics (30% louder in ‘Sport’ mode)
